long_description:
------ Created from incident source: INC10464728 ------
[COM] Multiple node Not Ready (Compute) is Triggered

TIP Runbook URL: https://pages.github.ibm.com/cloudlab/internal-docs/sysdig_node_not_ready.html
TIP Situation: Multiple nodes went NotReady state
TIP Short Description: Multiple nodes in mzone767 went NotReady state
TIP Console: toc
TIP CRN: crn:v1:::is-genctl:::mzone767:node:N/A

Event Generated:

Severity:         High
Metric:
    sum(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="false",kube_node_label_genctl_role_compute="true"}==1) by (kube_cluster_name) > 2 = 3
Segment:
    kube_cluster_name = 'mzone767'

Time:             12/03/2025 01:37 AM UTC
State:            Triggered
Notification URL: https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Fevents%2Fnotifications%2Fl%3A2419200%2F43894279%2Fdetails

------

Triggered by Alert:

Type:         Prometheus
Name:         [COM] Multiple node Not Ready (Compute)
Description:  Multiple compute nodes went to NotReady state
Team:         Monitor Operations
Scope:
    Everywhere
Alert When:   sum(kube_node_status_condition{condition="Ready", status="false",kube_node_label_genctl_role_compute="true"}==1) by (kube_cluster_name) > 2
Duration: 3 m
Alert URL:    https://us-east.monitoring.cloud.ibm.com:443/api/oauth/openid/IBM/2c4a1985f9d5c10bd4842d2d3989088e/a22d4a2e-0c44-4662-91bc-3607d0e2348f?redirectRoute=%2Falerts%2Frules%3FalertId%3D478255
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Current incident created by Danny Garcia Arroyo
